accept.description: true only if the whole project meets the PRD acceptance criteria and the test suite passes

assessment.description: 1-5 sentences: what you reviewed and the overall verdict

findings.description: Concrete problems found during the deep review; empty if none

evidence.description: the file/test/command output that proves it

fix_tasks.description: When accept is false: the tasks the worker must do to pass; empty when accept is true

report.description: human-readable acceptance report citing the PRD criteria and the evidence
